title: Compensation, Benefits, and Job Analysis Specialists
description: Conduct programs of compensation and benefits and job analysis for employer. May specialize in specific areas, such as position classification and pension programs.

tasks.text: Administer employee insurance, pension, and savings plans, working with insurance brokers and plan carriers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Ensure company compliance with federal and state laws, including reporting requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research employee benefit and health and safety practices, and recommend changes or modifications to existing policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise managers and employees on state and federal employment regulations, collective agreements, benefit and compensation policies, personnel procedures, and classification programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and develop curricula and materials for training programs and conduct training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist in preparing and maintaining personnel records and handbooks.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop and administer compensation programs, such as merit or incentive pay.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate job positions, determining classification, exempt or non-exempt status, and salary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare occupational classifications, job descriptions, and salary scales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with, or serve as, technical liaison between business, industry, government, and union officials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform multifactor data and cost analyses that may be used in areas such as support of collective bargaining agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, administer, and evaluate personnel and labor relations programs, including performance appraisal, affirmative action, and employment equity programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide advice on the resolution of classification and salary complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate collective agreements on behalf of employers or workers, and mediate labor disputes and grievances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze organizational, occupational, and industrial data to facilitate organizational functions and provide technical information to business, industry, and government.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess need for and develop job analysis instruments and materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe, interview, and survey employees and conduct focus group meetings to collect job, organizational, and occupational information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, develop, evaluate, improve, and communicate methods and techniques for selecting, promoting, compensating, evaluating, and training workers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research job and worker requirements, structural and functional relationships among jobs and occupations, and occupational trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports, such as organization and flow charts and career path reports, to summarize job analysis and evaluation and compensation analysis information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise staff of individuals' qualifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare research results for publication in form of journals, books, manuals, and film.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
